title: Stop plain export-public from rewriting committed public-site JSON
problem: Default mock-mode export-public writes to both data/exports/ and apps/public-site/public/data/, rewriting generated_at and updated_at timestamps in committed snapshot JSON and dirtying the repo after operator runs.
acceptance_criteria: Default mock-mode export-public writes only to data/exports/.
Committed public-site JSON updates require --publish or fixture_mode.
Fixture-mode runs still write deterministic snapshots to public-site paths.
Golden tests and export publish gate unit tests pass.
non_goals: Do not change public export schema or card field curation.
Do not auto-publish during fixture-mode beyond existing behavior.
rollback_plan: Revert ticket-047 branch; mock export-public again writes public-site JSON by default.
